description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms extending far above and behind his body, as if being pulled or stretched by an unseen force. He is dressed in a sleeveless vest over a shirt and long pants, with simple shoes on his feet. The facial features are angular and simplified, with short, neatly styled hair. The arms are the most prominent feature, appearing almost ribbon-like and extending well beyond the normal human range, giving the figure a surreal, dynamic appearance. The overall build is slender, and the clothing fits closely to the body, emphasizing the unusual proportions. The asset appears to be constructed from a solid, matte material with minimal surface detail.
description: A stylized adult male figure with extremely elongated, ribbon-like arms extending far above and behind his body, dressed in a vest, shirt, and pants. The figure has a slender build, simplified facial features, and short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and both elongated arms extending upward and outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extreme length and backward extension of the left arm, with the profile of the face and body visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, torso, and both arms stretching diagonally away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right arm's extension and the side profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless vest over a shirt and long pants
attribute_posture: standing with arms stretched far above and behind
